@signal(counter = counter) @signal(panelOpen = false) @signal(todoDraft = "") @signal(todoResult = "Waiting for API calls...")

${title}

Counter: @bind(counter)

@click("Increment", counter, "inc", "1") @click("Toggle Panel", panelOpen, "toggle")
    @for(item in items) {
  • ${item.name} - @lazy(item.ready) {ready} @fallback {pending}
    • }
@effect(counter) {
Hydrated counter: ${counter}
} @reactive(counter, panelOpen) {

React-like view count: ${counter}

@if(panelOpen) {
Reactive panel is open
} @else {
Reactive panel is closed
}
}
